passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
routeNameMin: Route name must be at least 2 characters
daysRequired: At least one day is required
timeFormat: Time must be in HH:mm format (e.g. '08:45')
stopsRequired: At least one stop is required
nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
plateMin: Plate must be at least 7 characters
addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters
dayOfMonthRequired: Choose a day of the month
monthOfYearRequired: Choose a month of the year
recurrenceEndDateAfterStart: End date must be after the start date
